/usr/bin/c++  -march=native -Ofast -g3 -std=c++14 -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/sodium_bench.dir/src/crypto_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sodium_bench.dir/src/global_buffers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sodium_bench.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sodium_bench.dir/src/test/unit_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sodium_bench.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sodium_bench.dir/src/weld_arch.cpp.o -o sodium_bench   -L/data/chenxuqiang/eval_framework/sodium_bench/../libsodium/src/libsodium/.libs  -Wl,-rpath,/data/chenxuqiang/eval_framework/sodium_bench/../libsodium/src/libsodium/.libs -lsodium -lbenchmark -lpthread
